evidence: Pod identity or labels indicate a CSI controller or node plugin
Back-off restarts are present for the crashing component

causes.message: Persistent volumes managed by CSI remain unavailable
Pod fails operations dependent on CSI-managed storage

pod:ebs-csi-node-rp9k2: Target pod appears to be a CSI component in CrashLoopBackOff

likely_causes: CSI driver misconfiguration or version mismatch
Storage endpoint or network issues affecting the CSI plugin
Resource starvation causing the CSI component to restart
suggested_checks: Inspect CSI driver Deployment or DaemonSet events
